This projct is my dotfiles repository. It contains configuration files for various applications and tools I use.

The operating systems this supports are:
- macOS
- Arch Linux
- Ubuntu 22.04 on WSL2 Windows 11


I am using a dotfiles manager called [chezmoi](https://github.com/twpayne/chezmoi). You can find the documentation for it here: https://www.chezmoi.io/

I am also using Ansible to manage some of the state of my system.

I am using neovim, vscode, and zsh as my main tools for development.
